name: Daily Email Triage (Outlook → AI → Email + Telegram)

parameters.text:
=You are summarizing batch {{ $json.batchNumber }} of {{ $json.totalBatches }}. This batch contains {{ $json.count }} email(s).

Use exactly these batch numbers in your header: Batch {{ $json.batchNumber }} of {{ $json.totalBatches }}.

Here are the emails:

{{ $json.emailsText }}

options.systemMessage:
You are an executive email-triage assistant. You analyze emails and output ONLY valid JSON — nothing else.
Output exactly this JSON structure (no markdown fences, no commentary, no text before or after):
{
  "overview": "1-3 sentence summary of the batch composition",
  "emails": [
    {
      "urgency": "URGENT" | "ACTION NEEDED" | "FYI" | "LOW PRIORITY",
      "sender": "sender name or address",
      "subject": "email subject line",
      "summary": "1-2 sentence summary of the email content",
      "deadline": "deadline if mentioned, otherwise null"
    }
  ]
}
RULES:
- Output ONLY the JSON object. No markdown, no code fences, no explanation.
- The "emails" array must be sorted by urgency: URGENT first, then ACTION NEEDED, then FYI, then LOW PRIORITY. Within the same urgency level, sort by soonest deadline first.
- Infer urgency purely from subject + body wording. Look for: "ASAP", "urgent", "by EOD", "today", explicit dates, outages, escalations, payments due.
- Use exactly one of the four urgency levels: URGENT, ACTION NEEDED, FYI, LOW PRIORITY.
- Keep summaries terse and factual.
- Set "deadline" to null if no deadline is mentioned.
- The overview should describe the composition, e.g. "This batch contains 5 emails: 2 action items, 1 appointment notice, 1 system alert, 1 promotional email."

DESIGN TOKENS:
Brand palette (use for UI chrome, backgrounds, accents):
  Primary Dark:  #293681
  Primary Blue:  #4274D9
  Accent Teal:   #95CCDD
  Light Teal:    #D0E7E6

Status colors (map urgency levels exactly as follows):
  URGENT:        #FF0052
  ACTION NEEDED: #FFD400
  FYI:           #0055DA
  LOW PRIORITY:  #00C68D

parameters.jsCode:
const raw = $input.first().json.output || '{}'; const batchNumber = $('Build Chunk Summary Input').item.json.batchNumber; const totalBatches = $('Build Chunk Summary Input').item.json.totalBatches; let data; try { const cleaned = raw.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/i, '').trim(); data = JSON.parse(cleaned); } catch (e) { return [{ json: { emailHtml: '

AI output could not be parsed as JSON. Raw output:

' + raw.replace(/
', batchNumber, totalBatches } }]; } const overview = data.overview || 'No overview available.'; const emails = data.emails || []; const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); const urgencyMeta = { 'URGENT': { color: '#FF2D55', glow: '#FF2D5530', label: '🔴 URGENT' }, 'ACTION NEEDED': { color: '#FF9500', glow: '#FF950030', label: '🟠 ACTION NEEDED' }, 'FYI': { color: '#00C7FF', glow: '#00C7FF30', label: '🔵 FYI' }, 'LOW PRIORITY': { color: '#00E676', glow: '#00E67630', label: '🟢 LOW PRIORITY' }, }; const urgencyOrder = ['URGENT', 'ACTION NEEDED', 'FYI', 'LOW PRIORITY']; const getUrgencyRank = (u) => { const idx = urgencyOrder.indexOf(u); return idx === -1 ? 99 : idx; }; const sorted = [...emails].sort((a, b) => getUrgencyRank(a.urgency) - getUrgencyRank(b.urgency)); const esc = (s) => String(s || '').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"'); let emailRows = ''; for (let i = 0; i < sorted.length; i++) { const em = sorted[i]; const meta = urgencyMeta[em.urgency] || urgencyMeta['FYI']; const isLast = i === sorted.length - 1; let deadlineHtml = ''; if (em.deadline && em.deadline !== 'null' && em.deadline !== null) { deadlineHtml = `
⏰ DEADLINE: ${esc(em.deadline)}
`; } emailRows += `
 
${esc(meta.label)}
${esc(em.sender)}
${esc(em.subject)}
${esc(em.summary)} ${deadlineHtml}
`; } const urgencyCounts = {}; for (const em of sorted) { urgencyCounts[em.urgency] = (urgencyCounts[em.urgency] || 0) + 1; } let statsHtml = ''; for (const level of urgencyOrder) { if (urgencyCounts[level]) { const meta = urgencyMeta[level]; statsHtml += `
${urgencyCounts[level]} ${esc(level)}
`; } } const html = `
📨 EMAIL SUMMARY
BATCH ${batchNumber} OF ${totalBatches}  •  ${esc(today)}  •  ${sorted.length} EMAIL${sorted.length !== 1 ? 'S' : ''}
${statsHtml}
⚡ Overview
${esc(overview)}
${emailRows}
Generated by Email Triage AI  •  ${esc(today)}
`; return [{ json: { emailHtml: html, batchNumber, totalBatches, aiData: data } }];

parameters.subject: =Email Summary — Batch {{ $('Render Email HTML').item.json.batchNumber }} of {{ $('Render Email HTML').item.json.totalBatches }}
